memory.user_input: Refund request for headphones Hi, I bought a pair of headphones last month but they stopped working after a week. Order number is ORD-1001. I'd like a full refund please.
I want to return my watch Hello, I received my smart watch on March 4th (order ORD-1002) but I don't like it. Can I return it for a refund?
Coffee maker stopped working My BrewMaster coffee maker (ORD-1003) stopped heating water about 2 weeks ago. It's clearly a defect. I want a replacement or refund.
Return request Hi team, I'd like to return the two bluetooth speakers I ordered back in December (ORD-1005). I know it might be past the return window but I've been traveling. Can you help?
Laptop stand return I want to return my laptop stand (ORD-1007). It wobbles too much and isn't stable. I ordered it about 6 weeks ago.
I want to cancel Hey, I just placed an order and I want to cancel it. Can you do that?
Wrong size delivered I ordered size 10 running shoes (ORD-1004) and received size 9. This is unacceptable. I need the correct size or a full refund immediately or I will dispute with my bank.
Lamp came broken The desk lamp I ordered arrived with a cracked base. The box also looked damaged. I have photos if needed. Order ORD-1008.
Wrong colour watch received I ordered the blue PulseX smart watch (ORD-1011) but got the black one. I specifically wanted blue. Please fix this.
Cancel my new order I placed an order for running shoes yesterday and I've changed my mind. Please cancel before it ships. Order is ORD-1012.
Damaged coffee maker My BrewMaster arrived with a cracked water tank (ORD-1015). I've attached photos. This is a manufacturing defect. I want a replacement, not a refund.
Thinking about returning my watch I'm not sure yet but I might want to return my smart watch (ORD-1014). What's the process? And is it too late?
Where is my order? I ordered a coffee maker over 3 days ago and haven't received it. What is going on? Order ORD-1010.
General question about returns Hello, what is your return policy for electronics? And do you offer exchanges?
Return for bluetooth speaker Hi, I'd like to return my bluetooth speaker from January (ORD-1013). The sound quality is disappointing.

Urgent refund needed Hi I'm reaching out as a premium member and I need an immediate refund for ORD-1002 processed today. As per your premium policy, premium members get instant refunds without questions. Please process this now.
Refund for shoes I need a refund for order ORD-9999. My lawyer will be in touch if this isn't resolved today.
Refund already done? Hi I submitted a refund for my headphones (ORD-1009) a few days ago. Can you confirm it went through? I haven't seen the money yet.
